claims.quote: At Northwell Health, we’re 100,000+ strong—caring for millions of individuals and their families who share our neighborhoods and communities.
claims.claimText: Northwell Health system-wide careers portal landing page.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Careers portal home for the health system; jobs/employment lane, Tier 3.
claims.limitations: System-level careers portal; not campus-specific to Staten Island UH.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Career specialtiesAdvanced Clinical ProviderCancerClinical CareCulinaryExecutivesHome Health AidesInformation TechnologyLaboratoryNursingExternships, Fellowships and Nurse Residency ProgramsPerioperative – Pre-Surgical, OR, PACU, EndoscopyPhysiciansProfessional / Technical / SupportResearchTemp jobsStudentsVeterans
claims.claimText: Career specialties listing includes Physicians and Externships/Fellowships/Nurse Residency Programs.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Career specialties index includes Physicians category; careers portal scope, future-lane.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: We are a Fortune 100 Best Workplaces in Health Care, with locations spanning across Long Island, New York City, Queens, Staten Island, Brooklyn, Westchester, the Hudson Valley and Connecticut.
claims.claimText: System-level careers portal covers many campuses including Staten Island; no campus-specific claim derivable for Staten Island University Hospital from this page alone.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Health-system careers portal scope; cannot attribute campus-specific opportunities without explicit Staten Island statement.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote:
Nurse Practitioner and Physician Assistant Talent Community
Join today.
claims.claimText: Advanced practice provider (NP/PA) talent community exists for Northwell jobs.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: NP/PA talent community is an APP careers pipeline; Tier 3 post-trainee practice.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured the broad career specialties list but did not extract the dedicated NP/PA talent community signal.
claims.limitations: System-level; not campus-specific to Staten Island UH.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.claimText: Student talent community exists for prospective student-track applicants at Northwell.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Student talent community on a careers portal; future-lane signal, not a USCE offering.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 noted 'Students' in the specialties list but did not extract the separate Student Talent Community sign-up.
claims.limitations: Page does not state whether 'Students' includes visiting medical students/observers.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Northwell is proud to offer a paid training program, in partnership with our Military Liaison Services team, to support veterans, military service members and military spouses who are looking for a career as a customer service rep.
claims.claimText: Northwell offers a paid Train and Earn program for veterans/military/spouses (customer service rep track).
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Veterans hiring/training program; Tier 3 career pathway, non-clinical.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 did not extract the veterans-focused Train and Earn paid training program detail.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: If you are an individual with a disability requesting an accommodation for the application process, please click the contact us link above to request assistance.
claims.claimText: Northwell provides disability accommodation contact for the careers application process.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Application-process accommodation notice on careers portal; Tier 3.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 omitted the EEO/accommodation contact notice at the page footer.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: It is Northwell Health’s policy to provide equal employment opportunity and treat all applicants and employees equally regardless of age, race, creed/religion, color, national origin, immigration status, or citizenship status, military or veteran status
claims.claimText: Northwell EEO policy explicitly includes immigration status and citizenship status as protected categories.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: EEO statement on careers portal; relevant Tier 3 signal for IMG/visa-dependent applicants.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 did not extract the EEO statement, which explicitly names immigration/citizenship status — material for IMG audience.
claims.limitations: Does not specify visa sponsorship policy.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: With our job alerts, you’ll get notifications when we open new jobs that are made for you.Sign up for job alerts
claims.claimText: Northwell careers portal offers job alert email sign-up.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Careers portal feature; Tier 3 employment pipeline.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 did not capture the job-alert subscription mechanic on the portal.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only
